title: Crunchy Halal Date Night Butter Dish
description: A savory and crunchy date night dish featuring halal-friendly butter, perfect for a romantic dinner.
instructions: Preheat your oven to broil setting.
Melt the butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Add dates and stir until evenly coated.
Spread the date-butter mixture on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper for easy cleanup.
Sprinkle a pinch of salt on top if desired, then place under the preheated broiler.
Broil for about 3-5 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly. Keep an eye on it to prevent burning.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
